2026_07_17_21_36_31_002.jpg.name: David Misenheimer
2026_07_17_21_36_31_002.jpg.notes: Scotland County NC, grid FM04gr, ARRL DXCC Honor Roll. Thanks for the park card, 73.

2026_07_17_21_36_31_008.jpg.name: Luis N. Edwards
2026_07_17_21_36_31_008.jpg.notes: Cherokee County NC, grid EM85ac. 14.247 MHz, 2153 UTC, RST 59. Rig FTDX10, 40m delta loop, 100 watts. Thanks for the contact from K-3322.

2026_07_17_21_38_12_016.jpg.name: Josh Roach
2026_07_17_21_38_12_016.jpg.notes: Graham County NC, grid EM85ci. 14.247 MHz, 2131 UTC, RST 59. Mountain vista card.

2026_07_17_21_38_38.jpg.name: Shannon Greathead
2026_07_17_21_38_38.jpg.notes: Western Carolina Amateur Radio Society, Murphy NC. 14.338 MHz, 2036 UTC, K-3383. Railroad bridge sunset card.

2026_07_17_21_38_38_006.jpg.name: Don Pettigrew
2026_07_17_21_38_38_006.jpg.notes: Mecklenburg County NC, grid EM95od. 2145 UTC, RST 59. Charlotte skyline card.

2026_07_17_21_40_35_002.jpg.name: Randy Bogdan
2026_07_17_21_40_35_002.jpg.notes: Erie County NY, grid FN02ou. 7.252 MHz, 2300 UTC, RST 59. Yaesu FT-710 with Elecraft KPA500 at 200 watts, EFLW up 20 ft. Eagle and flag card.

2026_07_17_21_43_01_002.jpg.name: Thomas W. Francis
2026_07_17_21_43_01_002.jpg.notes: Charlotte County FL, grid EL86. 1932 UTC, RST 58. Park-to-park from POTA K-4632 Myakka State Forest.

2026_07_17_21_44_02_008.jpg.name: Bob Viggiano
2026_07_17_21_44_02_008.jpg.notes: Saint Lucie County FL. 14.263 MHz, 2000 UTC, RST 55. Icom 7300 with Ameritron ALS-600 solid state amp, no more tubes here. See you again on 20 meters.

2026_07_17_21_45_29_004.jpg.name: Bill Florich
2026_07_17_21_45_29_004.jpg.notes: Saint Louis and Suburban Radio Club, grid EM48tm. 14.347 MHz, 1938 UTC, RST 59. Operating from K-1768 Lake of the Ozarks with FT-891 at 100 watts, hamstick vertical. Lighthouse card.

2026_07_17_21_45_29_006.jpg.notes: Jackson County MO, grid EM28sx. 2149 UTC, RST 59. Thanks for the activation and card. Alien portrait card.

2026_07_17_21_59_34.jpg.name: Mitch Matteau
2026_07_17_21_59_34.jpg.notes: Portable from POTA US-0702, Cherokee County SC, grid EM95. 14.222 MHz, RST 59. Also holds VA3AVQ; card confirms as N0DIM. Thanks for QSO.

2026_07_17_22_00_10_002.jpg.name: David Moser
2026_07_17_22_00_10_002.jpg.notes: McConnells SC, licensed since 2023. 0107 UTC, 100 watts, RST 59. POTA US-3313 and Icom 7300 noted on back. Cartoon shack card.

2026_07_17_22_06_42_006.jpg.name: Sal Dominianni
2026_07_17_22_06_42_006.jpg.notes: Madison County KY. 7.298 MHz, 1446 UTC, RST 59. Thanks for the QSL, POTA contact, hear from you again.

2026_07_17_22_06_42_018.jpg.name: Tom Payne
2026_07_17_22_06_42_018.jpg.notes: Warrick County IN, grid EM68ia. 7.270 MHz, RST 59. Thanks so much for the great card, 73s. Date confirmed by ADIF log match. Kentucky Lake lighthouse card.

2026_07_17_22_07_57_004.jpg.name: Bill Capps
2026_07_17_22_07_57_004.jpg.notes: Lee County AL, grid EM72. 7.260 MHz, 2330 UTC, RST 59. Yaesu FT-101MP at 190 watts, rotatable dipole at 50 ft. Activating and hunting POTA parks is fun.

2026_07_17_22_10_16_030.jpg.name: Jason
2026_07_17_22_10_16_030.jpg.notes: Saskatchewan, grid DO70fj, SK Hams. 28.357 MHz, 1907 UTC, RST 59. God bless and 73. Campfire and Yaesu HT card.

2026_07_17_22_12_27_004.jpg.name: Tom
2026_07_17_22_12_27_004.jpg.notes: Park-to-park from Shikellamy State Park PA, 75 watts, Yaesu FT-891 with BuddiStick Pro on a camera tripod. 14.306 MHz, 1651 UTC, RST 59. 73 and POTA on.

2026_07_17_22_12_27_006.jpg.notes: POTA themed yellow card with coiled cable art. 2252 UTC, RST 59. FRONT SCAN IS MIRRORED, rescan or flip horizontally before this goes on the wall.

2026_07_17_21_48_04_026.jpg.name: Ken Larsen
2026_07_17_21_48_04_026.jpg.notes: Williamson County TX, grid EM10, 10-X 70914. 28.382 MHz, 1732 UTC, RST 59, mode PH. Telegraph key parchment card.

2026_07_17_21_50_59.jpg.name: Steven Rayhill
2026_07_17_21_50_59.jpg.notes: Kent County RI, grid FN41gr. 14.338 MHz, 2027 UTC, RST 59, POTA K-3383. Icom IC-745 at 100 watts, homebrew hex beam. Thanks for POTA contact and really nice QSL card.

2026_07_17_21_53_18_014.jpg.name: Carl Ingram
2026_07_17_21_53_18_014.jpg.notes: Woodland Park CO. 28.382 MHz, 1741 UTC, RST 59, 100 watts. FT-857D with Buddipole dipole. Hope to hear you on air again soon. Oak tree card.

2026_07_17_21_46_27.jpg.name: Jerry Thieman
2026_07_17_21_46_27.jpg.notes: Texas County MO. 7.230 MHz, 1322 UTC, POTA K-3313. This is A.D. not B.C., Jesus Saves card.

2026_07_17_21_46_27_004.jpg.name: Jerry Thieman
2026_07_17_21_46_27_004.jpg.notes: Texas County MO. 7.270 MHz, 0117 UTC, POTA K-3384. Second card from Jerry.

2026_07_17_21_55_49_002.jpg.name: Allan K. Davis
2026_07_17_21_55_49_002.jpg.notes: Greenville IN, activating POTA K-4165. 7.280 MHz, 0135 UTC, RST 59. Had best time ever POTA, not bad for rookie. DATE COULD BE 6/4 OR 6/7 2023, verify against log for AC4HI before applying. Lakeside picnic table card.

2026_07_17_21_56_57_004.jpg.name: James Blumenfeld
2026_07_17_21_56_57_004.jpg.notes: Norfolk County MA, grid FN42ig. 14.264 MHz, 1958 UTC, RST 59. Red Toyota MR2 on track card.

2026_07_17_21_56_57_008.jpg.name: Doug Daniels
2026_07_17_21_56_57_008.jpg.notes: Shrewsbury MA, grid FN42dh. 14.247 MHz, 2146 UTC, RST 59. Icom IC-706 MkIIG. POTA logo card.

2026_07_17_21_56_57_014.jpg.name: William Locke
2026_07_17_21_56_57_014.jpg.notes: Worcester County MA, grid FN42ag. 14.247 MHz, 2139 UTC, RST 59. FTDX10 at 70 watts, G5RV. Thanks for the QSO and park, see you again. Vintage fire truck card.

2026_07_17_21_58_27_006.jpg.name: Dale Robbins
2026_07_17_21_58_27_006.jpg.notes: Franklin County AR, grid EM25, Locke Community in the Ozarks, ham since 1997. 14.257 MHz, 1359 UTC, RST 59, POTA K-3312. 100 watts Alinco DX70TH into 300 ft wire. Loves chasing parks, hopes to work you in a lighthouse. Sender mailed a second identical card in April 2024, pair 2026_07_17_21_58_27_024/025 is a duplicate and was deleted from intake.

2026_07_17_21_46_03.jpg.notes: Henry County MO, grid EM38cj. 18.133 MHz, 1929 UTC, sent 57 received 59, mode USB. Park-to-park K-4066 to K-1537. Colonial flag bearer parchment card.

2026_07_17_21_46_27_006.jpg.name: Jerry Thieman
2026_07_17_21_46_27_006.jpg.notes: Texas County MO. 14.248 MHz, 1304 UTC, RST 59. Third card from Jerry, DXCC 5BWAS WAC IOTA WAZ. This is A.D. not B.C., Jesus Saves card.

2026_07_17_21_48_04_004.jpg.name: Gary Dusbabek
2026_07_17_21_48_04_004.jpg.notes: Schertz TX. 14.248 MHz, 1318 UTC, RST 55. Park-to-park K-3045 to K-3315. FT-891 at 100 watts, WRC antenna. Thanks for the P2P, POTA on. See America San Antonio poster card. FRONT SCAN IS UPSIDE DOWN, rotate 180 before it goes on the wall.
